<?php use Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Renderers\ErrorPageRenderer; if (! function_exists('ddd')) { function ddd() { $args = func_get_args(); if (count($args) === 0) { throw new Exception('You should pass at least 1 argument to `ddd`'); } call_user_func_array('dump', $args); $renderer = app()->make(ErrorPageRenderer::class); $exception = new Exception('Dump, Die, Debug'); $renderer->render($exception); die(); } }
